medialive.channel.temporalfiltersettings:
Settings for the temporal filter to apply to the video.

The parents of this entity are H264FilterSettings, H265FilterSettings, and Mpeg2FilterSettings.

medialive.channel.temporalfiltersettings.Description: If you enable this filter, the results are the following: - If the source content is noisy (it contains excessive digital artifacts), the filter cleans up the source. - If the source content is already clean, the filter tends to decrease the bitrate, especially when the rate control mode is QVBR.
Choose a filter strength. We recommend a strength of 1 or 2. A higher strength might take out good information, resulting in an image that is overly soft.
